page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with 64 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention associated with hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer rates for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and compute-heavy resource ratio make this instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent, predictable CPU performance without memory overhead. It is designed for compute-intensive tasks such as high-performance web serving, batch processing, scientific modeling, and distributed analytics where a 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio is optimal.
